titleStmt.title: SII 39.48: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 48. (A.R. No. 48 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, 16TH CENTURY A.D.

summary.p: Built in at the right side. This inscription registers a grant of land evidently by Sāluva-Nāyaka and Appappiḷḷai to two private individuals Sakkadēvar, Vēṭṭuvakkāṭṭan and his brother Sirukāttavan of Kūḍalūr for performing the service of Pāḍikāval at Tirupputtur It also mentions the rehabitation of the old kuḍi who deserted the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
piṟapa varuṣam tai mātam 10 5 § puṟamalaināṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Āṇṭanayinār koyiṟ ciṟi paṇṭārak kāriyattukku kaṭavarom
kūṭalūril cakkatēvar veṭṭuvakkāttān Āṉa cāyapaṭai tāṅkikkum meṟpaṭi tampi ciṟukāttavaṉukkum pāṭikāva
mukkāṇi Āṭci piṟamāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi tirukkoḷakkuṭiyai cāḷuva nāyakkarum Appappiḷḷaiyum tirupputtūrkku
vāyile Ūrum Aḻintu kuṭikaḷum kalaintu kuṭiyum Ēṟāmal kiṭakkaiyil Inta Ūr kuṭi Ēṟṟa Oruttarum Ilātapaṭiyāle
ṭuvakkāttavaṉaiyum ciṟukāttavaṉaiyum Aḻaittu tammaiyā nāyakkar kāriyattukkuk kaṭava ciṭṭamanāyakkarum kāḷa
rum Āka Ivarkaḷai Aḻaittu Inta Ūrai kuṭi Ēṟṟukaiyil Ivarkaḷukku cuvantiramāka Uṭaiyavar tirukkai
ka tiruvuḷam paṟṟiṉapaṭi tirumalai cūḻnta paṟṟil putukkuḷamum vayalum nāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañcai puñcaiyuma
lai maṭṭu Uḻunayināṟku Intappaṟṟukku Aṟṟa mariyāti varicai māppaṇamum pettup potuvile Iṭu cuvantira
Iṭṭu tevarkkaṭṭu mukkaipīcam Āka potumakkaḷ peṟum Iṭṭu Uḻutu payir ceyyak kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum pa
lum nañcaip paṟṟukku viḷainta paṟṟukku payir payir pāttu niṉṟa nilattukku Orumā nilattukku tūṇipatakku
m Iṭṭu valaiyaṟku Ēriṉukku tūṇiyum puṉavalukku patakkum peṟṟu Iṭaiyaṉ valaiyan Āṭi kāttikaikku
nāḷukku parivaṭṭamum kaṭṭi tītta tiruniṟum peṟṟu cantirātittavaraikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷa
Digital edition of SII 39.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
